name: crystal-space
description: Backend for Crystal's Space — a private chat where Crystal updates Married in Cabo budget/vendor/site content, saved instantly to Cloudflare KV.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Your Claude API key from console.anthropic.com (starts with sk-ant-). Powers Crystal's replies.

SPACE_PIN.description: A short PIN only you and Crystal know (e.g. a 4-6 digit code). Locks this chat so only she can use it.
